canonical_name: Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte
description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Rio Grande do Norte, founded on March 27, 2013, at the Alcaçuz penitentiary. It is the largest criminal group in the state, involved in drug trafficking, murders, robberies, extortion, and prison rebellions. Created as a reaction to the control of the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC), it has been in conflict with the PCC and other rival factions. The group remains active.
